description: You are an Order Clerk who just received an alert from accounting that a wire transfer has cleared for a client's open invoice. Update the CRM for invoice 'INV-90950: Meridian Quarterly Supplies' by changing its status to 'Paid'. Create a related note linked directly to this invoice with the subject 'Wire Transfer Confirmed' and the body 'Payment of $14,500 received via wire transfer on March 8. Transaction Ref: TXN-44892A. Cleared by Accounting.'
